docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CORVINO, JOSEPH CORVINO, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT FORSTER, BEVERLY BUTTON, JAN IND/DBA JBS ASSOCIATES BUTTON, SYD IND/DBA CAVALIER MFG. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-30-1998, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JAN-13-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FORSTER, BEVERLY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTON, JAN IND/DBA JBS ASSOCIATES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORVINO, JOSEPH CORVINO, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORSTER, BEVERLY BUTTON, JAN IND/DBA JBS ASSOCIATES BUTTON, SYD IND/DBA CAVALIER MFG. INC. $2,070.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,140.00, THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD A DEFENDANT: BUTTON, SYD IND/DBA CAVALIER MFG. INC. JUDGMENT IS AGAINST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
